debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
x : PersistenceSubmodule M
hx : x ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN
a : PersistenceSubmodule M
ha : a ≤ x
ha' : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})
⊢ a ≤ ⊥

failed_attempts:
-- Extract N₀ ∈ D such that x ∈ B N₀ hN₀
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀, hxB⟩ := hx
    -- x ≤ N₀ since x ∈ B N₀ hN₀ and sSup(B N₀ hN₀) = N₀
    have hxN₀ : x ≤ N₀ := hB N₀ hN₀ ▸ le_sSup hxB
    -- sSup(carrier \ {x}) ≤ sSup(B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup(↑D \ {N₀})
    have h_bound : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤
        sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup ((SetLike.coe D) \ {N₀}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyne⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN : N' = N₀
      · subst hNN
        exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyne⟩)
      · apply le_sup_of_le_right
        apply le_trans (le_sSup hyB)
        rw [← hB N' hN']
        exact le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem hN' hNN)
    -- Modular law step
    have hBleN₀ : sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ≤ N₀ :=
      le_trans (sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset)) (hB N₀ hN₀ ▸ le_rfl)
    have hDisjD : Disjoint N₀ (sSup ((SetLike.coe D) \ {N₀})) :=
      D.sSupIndep hN₀
    have hModular : N₀ ⊓ (sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup ((SetLike.coe D) \ {N₀})) =
        sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := by
      rw [inf_comm, sup_inf_assoc_of_le _ hBleN₀, inf_comm]
      rw [disjoint_iff.mp hDisjD, sup_bot_eq]
    -- a ≤ sSup(B N₀ hN₀ \ {x})
    have ha_le_sSupB : a ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := by
      calc a ≤ N₀ ⊓ (sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup ((SetLike.coe D) \ {N₀})) :=
            le_inf (le_trans ha hxN₀) (le_trans ha' h_bound)
        _ = sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) := hModular
    -- Finally: a ≤ x ⊓ sSup(B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) = ⊥
    exact (hB' N₀ hN₀ hxB) ha ha_le_sSupB
